_provenance.source: WorldGovernmentBonds public chart API (wp-json/common/v1/historical), POST FUNCTION=CDS COUNTRY=Turkey(13) DURATA=60
_provenance.note: Turkey 5y sovereign CDS, daily, basis points. Anchors are FIXED PAST closes (immutable) used as the smoke_check VALUE drift guard. The 2025-03-24 spike to ~300bps is the Imamoglu-shock credit-stress signature.

_golden_master.backs: The rates/CDS rung's credit factor (TRCDS5Y). WGB is the W3-sanctioned free source (NOT Investing.com / ToS).
_golden_master.stable_window: Fixed past dates — historical CDS closes do not change, so these are real value anchors.
